title: Registration Code Entity
description: A single registration (validation) code row as returned by the admin registration-code API.

id.description: Stable identifier for the row (equals the code value).

id_groups.description: ID of the group the code grants membership to once consumed.

consumed_at.description: UTC consumption timestamp, null when the code is still available.

is_consumed.description: Whether the code has already been consumed.

id_users.description: ID of the user the code was linked to on consumption, null when still available.

user_email.description: Email of the user the code was linked to on consumption, null when still available.
